allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/<script id=\\"ee-page-script\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\);try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('ee-page-script: OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERROR:',e.message\);}const css=s.match\(/<style id=\\"ee-page-styles\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\);const o=\(css[1].match\(/\\{/g\)||[]\).length,c=\(css[1].match\(/\\}/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('CSS braces',o,c,o===c?'OK':'MISMATCH'\);console.log\('selectors count in hero HTML:', \(s.match\(/ee-model-selector\\" data-state/g\)||[]\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);['ee-page-script','v4-proposal-select-script'].forEach\(function\(id\){const m=s.match\(new RegExp\('<script id=\\"'+id+'\\">\([\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\S]*?\)</script>'\)\);if\(m\){try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\(id,'OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(id,'ERR',e.message\);}}}\);const css=s.match\(/<style id=\\"ee-page-styles\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\);const o=\(css[1].match\(/\\{/g\)||[]\).length,c=\(css[1].match\(/\\}/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('ee-page CSS braces',o,c,o===c?'OK':'MISMATCH'\);const css2=s.match\(/<style id=\\"v4-proposal-select-styles\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/style>/\);if\(css2\){const o2=\(css2[1].match\(/\\{/g\)||[]\).length,c2=\(css2[1].match\(/\\}/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('select-styles braces',o2,c2,o2===c2?'OK':'MISMATCH'\);}")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Users\\joaopedro.martin_v4c\\Downloads\\EE-2026\\Estruturacao-Estrategica\\assets\\Garantiaexecutar.png"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $img; $w = $bmp.Width; $samples = @\(0, [int]\($w/2\), $w-1\); foreach \($x in $samples\) { $p = $bmp.GetPixel\($x, 0\); Write-Output \("x=$x top -> #{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}" -f $p.R,$p.G,$p.B\) }; $p2 = $bmp.GetPixel\([int]\($w/2\), 3\); Write-Output \("center y=3 -> #{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}" -f $p2.R,$p2.G,$p2.B\); Write-Output "size: $w x $\($bmp.Height\)"; $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($src = "c:\\Users\\joaopedro.martin_v4c\\Downloads\\EE-2026\\Estruturacao-Estrategica"; $dst = "c:\\Users\\joaopedro.martin_v4c\\Downloads\\EE-2026\\estruturacao-estrategica-teste"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Write-Output "Destino ja existe: $dst" } else { Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dst -Recurse; Write-Output "Copiado." }; Write-Output "--- conteudo do destino \(topo\) ---"; Get-ChildItem $dst | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output \("index.html existe: " + \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $dst 'index.html'\)\)\); Write-Output \("assets existe: " + \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $dst 'assets'\)\)\))

PowerShell($srcA = "c:\\Users\\joaopedro.martin_v4c\\Downloads\\EE-2026\\Estruturacao-Estrategica\\assets"; $dstA = "c:\\Users\\joaopedro.martin_v4c\\Downloads\\EE-2026\\estruturacao-estrategica-teste\\assets"; $sc = \(Get-ChildItem $srcA -Recurse -File | Measure-Object\).Count; $dc = \(Get-ChildItem $dstA -Recurse -File | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Output "assets origem: $sc arquivos | assets teste: $dc arquivos"; Write-Output \("Iguais: " + \($sc -eq $dc\)\))

PowerShell($d = "c:\\Users\\joaopedro.martin_v4c\\Downloads\\EE-2026\\estruturacao-estrategica-teste"; Remove-Item \(Join-Path $d "index.html.bak"\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item \(Join-Path $d "index.html.bak-precleanup"\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item \(Join-Path $d "_arquivo-proposta-e-ctas.html"\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Backups removidos da pasta de teste."; Get-ChildItem $d -File | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(awk 'NR>=7305 && NR<=7360 { if \(/id="problema"/\) print NR": START "$0; if \(/<\\/section>/\) print NR": </section>" }' index.html)
Bash(awk '/<style id="ds-showcase-styles">/{f=1} f&&/<style id="ee-page-styles">/{f=0} f' index.html)
Bash(grep -nE "\\.ds-bg-gradient \\.ds-state-label|/\\* ── SCROLL TEXT REVEAL|<style id=\\"ee-page-styles\\">" index.html)
Bash(awk '/<\\/style>/{last=NR} /<style id="ee-page-styles">/{print "ds-showcase </style> em: " last; print "ee-page-styles <style> em: " NR; exit}' index.html)
Bash(awk '/<style id="ds-showcase-styles">/{f=1} f{print NR": "$0} /<style id="ee-page-styles">/{exit}' index.html)
Bash(awk '/<style id="\(wp-block|spicerack\)/{id=$0; start=NR} /<\\/style>/{if\(start\){printf "%d-%d \(%d linhas\): %s\\n", start, NR, NR-start+1, id; start=0}}' index.html)
Bash(awk '/<style id="ee-page-styles">/{f=1} f&&/<\\/style>/{print NR": "$0; exit} f&&/^\\.[a-z].*\\{/{last=NR": "$0} END{}' index.html)
